predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person cannot prove they hold Belgian nationality and is therefore a foreigner.

predicates.name: holds_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person holds Belgian nationality, as directly stated or proven in the case.

predicates.name: is_eu_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting or no longer meeting the conditions for entry or residence.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for processing an international protection request.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a current and real risk that the person will abscond, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_by_national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner under the statutory definition.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the statutory deadline.

predicates.name: used_false_information_or_documents_or_fraud
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a protection, residence, removal, or pushback procedure.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations on entry, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: indicated_or_demonstrated_non_compliance_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure from another member state.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision_or_measure
predicates.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_schengen_state
predicates.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the state responsible for processing an international protection request.

predicates.name: filed_multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
predicates.description: The person filed multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or one or more other member states that resulted in a negative decision or did not lead to the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned on this point, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: declared_or_file_shows_entry_for_other_purposes
predicates.description: The person declared or their file shows that they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine because they filed a manifestly unfounded appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective statutory criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
